title: Corrective fix for B-b0981c8e-review: Review Detect planner-provided shared followups in scheduler
description:
Blocked reason: Reused planner-owned review beads are not re-linked to newly created tester/documentation followups, so review may run before required followup work completes.

Remaining work: Medium: [src/codex_orchestrator/scheduler.py](/Users/oscar.renalias/Projects/codex-agent-orchestration/.orchestrator/agent-runs/B-b0981c8e-review/repo/src/codex_orchestrator/scheduler.py#L835) reuses an existing planner-owned `review` bead and only calls scope sync at [src/codex_orchestrator/scheduler.py](/Users/oscar.renalias/Projects/codex-agent-orchestration/.orchestrator/agent-runs/B-b0981c8e-review/repo/src/codex_orchestrator/scheduler.py#L855). When tester or documentation followups are missing and get newly created in this pass, that reused review bead is not updated to depend on the new `test_id`/`doc_id`, so review can become runnable before the newly created validation/doc work completes.
acceptance_criteria: Implement the minimum fix required to unblock B-b0981c8e-review.
Update tests/docs as needed for the corrective change.
Leave a handoff summary that states how the parent bead can be retried.

handoff_summary.completed: Updated `src/codex_orchestrator/scheduler.py` to sync dependencies on reused review followups with the current developer bead, tester bead, and documentation bead IDs. Added a small helper to merge and persist missing followup dependencies. Verified the change with `uv run python -m py_compile src/codex_orchestrator/scheduler.py` and `uv run python -c "import codex_orchestrator"`.
handoff_summary.remaining: Parent bead B-b0981c8e-review can now be retried; no additional implementation work is required in this corrective bead.
handoff_summary.risks: No test suite was run per developer guardrails, so behavioral validation of scheduler ordering still depends on the tester/review pipeline. The change is intentionally narrow and only affects reused review-followup dependency repair.
handoff_summary.next_action: Retry bead `B-b0981c8e-review`; the scheduler should now keep a reused planner-owned review bead blocked on any newly created tester/documentation followups.
handoff_summary.conflict_risks: Scheduler followup selection still mixes planner-owned shared beads with legacy child creation; downstream agents should continue assuming partially pre-created shared followup sets may need dependency repair when reused.

conflict_risks: Scheduler followup selection still mixes planner-owned shared beads with legacy child creation; downstream agents should continue assuming partially pre-created shared followup sets may need dependency repair when reused.

Patched scheduler reuse of planner-owned review followups so reused review beads are re-linked to newly created tester/documentation followups before they can run.

guardrails.template_text:
# Developer Guardrails

Primary responsibility: Implement only the assigned bead inside the existing architecture and file scope.

Allowed actions:
- Modify code, configuration, or local docs required to complete the assigned bead.
- Create sub-beads for discovered follow-up work that should be handled separately.
- Verify your changes compile and import correctly with a quick syntax check: `uv run python -c "import codex_orchestrator"` or `uv run python -m py_compile <file>`.

Disallowed actions:
- Run any test suite — not `unittest discover`, not `unittest tests.<module>`, not any subset. Test execution is exclusively the tester agent's responsibility. Running tests wastes the agent budget and delays the pipeline.
- Redesign unrelated architecture or broaden scope beyond the assigned bead.
- Perform final review signoff in place of a review agent.
- Silently absorb unrelated test, documentation, or planning work that should be handed off.

Expected outputs:
- Completed or blocked JSON with concise implementation summary.
- Accurate touched files, changed files, risks, and follow-up handoff fields.
